title: The ADR Index
description: Start at the README — the index table for all 35 nxtlvl Architecture Decision Records. It is the single entry point that lists each decision's summary and live status, including which ADRs supersede or amend others, and points back to the intent/spec/plan anchors the decisions consume. Critically, superseded ADRs are kept, never deleted: the record preserves the project's reasoning history, so this tour reads the decisions not as a flat list but as an evolving argument.

title: Founding: Packaging & Reference
description: The harness's two founding decisions establish how nxtlvl ships and how it learns. ADR-001 packages nxtlvl as a Claude Code plugin installed through a local marketplace, making install/uninstall atomic instead of hand-edited config. ADR-002 keeps the ecc harness installed-but-dormant as a reference and fallback backstop. Together with the `compose-not-reconstruct` concept, they encode the spine of the whole corpus: study existing harnesses, reconstruct only the plumbing, and compose the substance rather than rebuilding it.

title: The Compose Spine, Re-Cut
description: ADR-003 is the most-referenced decision in the corpus (fan-in 18): the founding three-tier rule — compose on native + agent-skills, reconstruct only plumbing, never reconstruct orchestration. Watch it evolve. ADR-027 first amends it, stripping the agent-skills 'fallthrough floor' so the router endorses only established items. Then ADR-035 supersedes it entirely, generalizing the rule to 'compose substance from any reviewed harness' with no privileged source. This is the clearest worked example of how a core strategy gets re-cut while its lineage stays on the record.

title: Governance & Principles
description: Before the harness can grow, two meta-decisions set the rules of the game. ADR-010 establishes a global decision rule — the interview → spec → plan → doc pipeline plus an ADR-worthy threshold — that governs which decisions even become ADRs (this very corpus is its output). ADR-014 reframes the project's value function: quality is the objective, and size/leanness are only backstops, never the goal. It amends the earlier context-budget and intake-gate decisions to bend them toward quality-first.

title: Context & Memory
description: How the harness remembers and what it injects. ADR-004 extends native Claude Code file-memory rather than building a new store. ADR-007 (fan-in 13) treats context assembly as a budgeted injection policy — pointers over content, organized by lifetime. ADR-013 then ties these together into a session-lifecycle backbone: an always-on automatic floor plus on-demand commands, superseding the old intake gate and amending the memory, metric, context, and hook decisions at once — the single biggest consolidating move in the corpus.

title: Hooks & Gating
description: When is the harness allowed to block you? ADR-006 sets the absolute rule: hooks fail open on error, and deliberate blocking is permitted only through an invoked gate, always with a kill switch. ADR-009 makes any promotion gate objective and binary — it blocks on facts (integrity, declared evals), never on taste. ADR-008, the original reactive-growth intake gate, is the corpus's highest fan-in node (20) precisely because so much pointed at it — and it was later superseded by ADR-013's floor, showing how a load-bearing decision can be retired without erasing it.

title: The Agent Model
description: The largest cluster of decisions defines how agents and skills divide labor. ADR-012 sets the load-bearing rule — agents execute, skills hold knowledge — with agent definitions pointing to a skill as single source of truth. ADR-017 keeps the main session as orchestrator and agents as scoped specialists on a lean contract. ADR-021 adopts a gated delegate-don't-inline orchestration pipeline, and ADR-022 fixes the operating mode: gated, interactive, single-operator sessions, not autonomous runtimes. This is the architecture that every workflow domain later instantiates.

title: Workflow Domains
description: With the agent model fixed, nxtlvl ships concrete capability domains, each as a three-layer command → agent → skill stack. ADR-024 ships git-workflows with an isolated, edit-less executor that can commit and push but never rewrite source. ADR-026 ships ideation — but inverts the shape, putting the orchestrator skill on the main thread because the interview must stay interactive. ADR-028 adds project management as a 'manage-and-see' dashboard layer. The shared `three-layer-domain` concept is the template; each domain bends it to fit.

title: Docs-Grounding: Leads vs. Evidence
description: Two near-identical decisions reach opposite conclusions — a sharp lesson in matching policy to source trust. ADR-029 lets DeepWiki accelerate harness-review as an orientation source only: leads, never evidence, with zero DeepWiki citations allowed in any artifact. ADR-030 is the deliberate inverse: Context7 testifies, producing cite-stamped evidence pinned to an official doc URL and version. Both share the `read-only-by-withheld-tools` pattern — a scout enforced read-only by withholding write tools structurally, not by prompt instruction.

title: Labs, Build & Tooling
description: The newest layer governs how capabilities incubate and which language the harness is built in. ADR-031 places the labs as tracked subdirs where graduation is an in-repo `git mv`. ADR-032 makes cells installable as plugins using stage-as-data manifests to avoid files-as-state, and ADR-034 makes TypeScript the default language via native Node type-stripping — no build step, erasable-syntax-only. Each honors the older principles: the labs reuse ADR-009's objective gate and ADR-006's fail-open rule rather than inventing new machinery.

title: How Decisions Evolve
description: The tour closes on the relationships themselves — the supersede/amend chains that make this a living architecture rather than a static spec. ADR-003 → ADR-035 re-cut the compose strategy; ADR-023 → ADR-024 re-shipped the git workflow from an in-context skill to a three-layer domain; ADR-008 → ADR-013 retired the intake gate in favor of the session floor. In every case the superseded ADR is preserved with a live pointer forward, so the corpus teaches not just what nxtlvl decided, but why each decision changed.
